ddls:
CREATE TABLE "msas" (
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSA (CBSA code) */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* Name of the MSA */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the MSA is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the MSA (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the MSA */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the MSA in square kilometers */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the MSA */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the MSA */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the MSA */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value in the MSA */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent in the MSA */,
  "median_income_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual median income growth rate in the MSA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data record */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the MSA (CBSA code) */,
  "tracts" INTEGER /* Number of census tracts in the MSA */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the MSA */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Median home price in the MSA */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the MSA */,
  "pi" REAL /* Price-to-income ratio (PI) */,
  "pi_map" TEXT /* Category of the PI (e.g., Low, Normal range) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "housing_stock" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the MSA */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of vacant housing units */,
  "foreclosure_rate" REAL /* Percentage of foreclosed properties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES msas ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the MSA (CBSA code) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the MSA */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the MSA */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the MSA */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the MSA */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Annual inflation rate */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual employment growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES msas ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "pi_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PI distribution record */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the MSA (CBSA code) */,
  "pi_10" REAL /* 10th percentile of the PI */,
  "pi_90" REAL /* 90th percentile of the PI */,
  "pi_10_90" REAL /* Difference between the 90th and 10th percentiles of the PI */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "pi_25" REAL /* 25th percentile of the PI */,
  "pi_75" REAL /* 75th percentile of the PI */,
  "pi_median" REAL /* Median of the PI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pi_distribution_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES msas ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the MSA (CBSA code) */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Name of the census tract */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the census tract */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the census tract in square kilometers */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the census tract */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the census tract */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the census tract */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value in the census tract */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent in the census tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_tracts_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES msas ("cbsa_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit record */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of housing unit (e.g., Single-family, Multi-family) */,
  "unit_count" INTEGER /* Number of housing units of this type in the tract */,
  "median_price" INTEGER /* Median price of housing units of this type in the tract */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of households in this type of housing unit */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of vacant units */,
  "rental_price" INTEGER /* Median rental price for the unit type */,
  "owner_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of owner-occupied units */,
  "renter_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of renter-occupied units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being accessed (e.g., housing, economic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version (e.g., changes made, reasons for the update) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last accessed */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data-source mapping */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being mapped */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data being mapped */,
  "mapping_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_data" (
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial data record */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the MSA (CBSA code) */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometric data for mapping (e.g., polygons, points) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data collection */,
  "zoom_level" INTEGER /* Zoom level for the spatial data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the spatial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_cbsa_code FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code") REFERENCES msas ("cbsa_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("tract_id")
)
